title: Environment variables always override powerhouse.config.json values, enabling per-environment configuration layering
content: Powerhouse services accept configuration via two methods: `.env` file (key-value pairs, loaded by `ph service start`) and `powerhouse.config.json` (structured JSON). Environment variables always take precedence over config file values. This enables a layered approach: define defaults in the JSON file, override for specific environments using env vars. Connect has extensive feature flags (PH_CONNECT_DISABLE_ADD_DRIVE, PH_CONNECT_STUDIO_MODE, PH_CONNECT_PUBLIC_DRIVES_ENABLED, etc.) and Renown configuration (PH_CONNECT_RENOWN_URL, RENOWN_CHAIN_ID). Switchboard config includes DATABASE_URL, AUTH_ENABLED, ADMINS, DEFAULT_PROTECTION. Changes require `ph service restart`.
description: Set defaults in powerhouse.config.json, override for dev/staging/prod via .env file or shell environment.
